query:
SELECT id, name FROM product_catalog WHERE name LIKE '%Pacote Paris%' OR name LIKE '%Europa%';
SELECT id, name FROM product_categories WHERE name LIKE '%Europa%' OR name LIKE '%Destinos%';

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT id, name FROM product_catalog WHERE name LIKE '%Pacote Paris%' OR name LIKE '%Europa%';
SELECT id, name FROM product_categories WHERE name LIKE '%Europa%' OR name LIKE '%Destinos%';
